releases.notes: Replaces broken 0.1.0/0.1.1. Fixes: wizard-image squash, alembic chain hole that prevented first-launch migration, end-to-end SHA-256 verification of update downloads, SPA fallback for deep-link reloads, audit-preserving forced template delete, restored window.nodone bridge handlers, contextual double-confirm wording. New: event document templates seeded by data migration. Infrastructure release; UI polish before first official user-facing v1.
